body: Adds an `experience-extraction.v3.md` system prompt + extends the few-shot examples for industry-tag normalization.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+# Experience Extraction Prompt v3
+
+You normalize free-text resume bullets into structured experience records.
+
+## Few-shot examples
+
+Input: "Led a 5-person team in launching a new product, AND owned the GTM motion."
+Output: { team_size: 5, scope: ["product launch", "GTM"] }
